zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Burgoyne於1392年出生在英國坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓時，她的父親John De Burgoyne Esq.32歲，母親Alice Margaret Harleston22歲。她於大約1409年與John de Peyton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年5月6日在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Burgoyne于1392年出生在英国坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓时，她的父亲John De Burgoyne Esq.32岁，母亲Alice Margaret Harleston22岁。她于大约1409年与John de Peyton在英国英格兰坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年5月6日在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Burgoyne was born in 1392, in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John De Burgoyne Esq., was 32 and her mother, Alice Margaret Harleston, was 22. She married John de Peyton about 1409, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 May 1439, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Burgoyne est née en 1392, à Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Burgoyne Esq., avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Margaret Harleston, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John de Peyton environ 1409, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1439, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Burgoyne 1392 in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Burgoyne Esq. 32 und ihre Mutter Alice Margaret Harleston 22. Sie hat um 1409 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom John de Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1439 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Burgoyne è nata il nel 1392 nel Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John De Burgoyne Esq., aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice Margaret Harleston, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John de Peyton circa 1409, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 maggio 1439, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Burgoyneが1392年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドリー ドレイトンで生まれた時，父John De Burgoyne Esq.は32歳，母Alice Margaret Harlestonは22歳であった。約1409年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでJohn de Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年5月6日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Burgoyne(이)가 1392년 영국 캄브리지실르 드리 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Burgoyne Esq.(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Margaret Harleston(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 John de Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 5월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Burgoyne nasceu em 1392, em Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Burgoyne Esq., tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Margaret Harleston, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Peyton aproximadamente 1409, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1439, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Burgoyne родилась в 1392 г. в местности дри дреитон, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Burgoyne Esq. было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Margaret Harleston, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Peyton около 1409 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 мая 1439 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Burgoyne nació en 1392, en Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Burgoyne Esq., tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Margaret Harleston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John de Peyton aproximadamente 1409, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1439, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
